rulings.Case Title: MF FUND II LP, VS. BERTHA DIAZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 4, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT BERTHA DIAZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, five days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161a. In future defense counsel to comply with SFLR 2.6C. If not, matter will be ordered off calendar. = (501/REQ)
